user.title: Panasonic Smart Laundry
user.description: Sign in with your CLUB Panasonic account.

model.title: Select machine model
model.description: Choose the COM_ID that matches your washing machine (e.g. NA-VX9800).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Panasonic Smart Laundry
reauth_confirm.description: Your session expired. Enter your password again.

error.invalid_model: The selected machine model is not supported.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Panasonic cloud.
error.no_appliance: No registered washing machine was found in your account.

abort.already_configured: This washing machine is already configured.
